race.comment: FUNDORA (3) is yet to break through in three runs. Finished fifth at his last appearance over 1350m at Ipswich on May 30. Likely to be in the finish in this suitable assignment. NASIRON (4) returned from a spell four weeks ago when he was fourth over 1200m at Chinchilla. Fitter so expect a better run this time. WAITING FOR GRAHAM (14) has been unplaced at all three runs this prep, the latest when fourth over 1400m at Beaudesert three weeks ago. Look for an improved run. SUMMER READY (9) comes here off a short break and looks well placed on some of the form she showed last campaign. Disappointed in her last couple, but if she can return somewhere near her best, she'll take beating.
